heading: Omitted
label: 43 to 45 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 43 to 45, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 43, acts , ; , , designated Alaska Historical Library and Museum as a depository of Government publications.June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 3331 Stat. 333Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1029Section 44, acts , ; , , limited amount of taxes that could be levied by incorporated towns or municipalities.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 937 Stat. 514June 3, 1948, ch. 39662 Stat. 302Section 44a, , , related to bonded indebtedness of municipalities for public works.act May 28, 1936, ch. 467, § 149 Stat. 1388Section 44b, acts , ; , , related to approval by electors of bonded indebtedness incurred by municipal corporation.May 28, 1936, ch. 467, § 249 Stat. 1388June 14, 1937, ch. 33750 Stat. 258Section 44c, , , provided for issuance, sale and redemption, and interest rates of bonds.act May 28, 1936, ch. 467, § 349 Stat. 1388Section 44d, , , authorized tax levies for payment of bonds.act May 28, 1936, ch. 467, § 449 Stat. 1389Section 44e, , , repealed conflicting laws.act May 28, 1936, ch. 467, § 549 Stat. 1389Section 44f, , , authorized bonds for public works by municipalities and public utility districts.act Mar. 6, 1946, ch. 52, § 160 Stat. 33Section 44g, , , related to issuance, sale and redemption, and interest rates on bonds for public works.act Mar. 6, 1946, ch. 52, § 260 Stat. 33Section 44h, , , related to covenants in bonds issue for public works.act Mar. 6, 1946, ch. 52, § 360 Stat. 34Section 44i, , , repealed laws inconsistent with sections 44f to 44i of this title.act Mar. 6, 1946, ch. 52, § 460 Stat. 34Section 45, , , prescribed residence qualifications for divorce actions.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 937 Stat. 514
